titleStmt.title: SII 31.114: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 114. (A.R. No. B 271 of 1936.) IÑJĒḌU, KOILKUNTLA TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up against the prākāra wall (inside), to the proper right of the main entrance into the temple of Veṅkaṭēśvara.
It is dated in Śaka 1476, Ānanda, Chaitra śu. 10, Corresponding to March 13, Tuesday, 1554 A.D.

Registers the gift of income of 0113 ka per year by Parvvatayya, Anantamayya, sons of Vallabhayya of Kāsyapa gōtra, Kēśavayya of Vāsishṭha gōtra with the permission of a body of Vipravinōdins consisting of different gōtras, sūtras with different nomenclatures to the god Veṅkaṭanādha of Iñjēḍu on the occasion of Śrī Rāmajayanthi, for the properity of their community. The said gift is granted to them by Aśēshamahājanas of Iñjēḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣa
ṁbulu 1476 Agunēṭī Anaṁda saṁvatyara caiyita (caitra)śu 10 lu śrī
maṁnmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīsadā
śivarāyamahārāyalu pṛidhvisāṁmrājyaṁ śēyu cuṁḍaṁgānu Ā(A)
khilāṁḍakōṭi brahmaṁḍanāyakuṁḍainaIna Iṁjēṭisdhalamaṁ
duveṁccēsi vunna śrīveṁkaṭanādhuni divyaśrī pāda padmaṁbu
ludēvaradāsulu kāśyapagōtraṁ Āpastaṁbhasūtraṁ yaju
śākhādhyāyulaiyina vallabhayyaṁgāri komāḷlu parvva
tayya Anaṁtayyagārunu gōviṁdayyagāri komāruṁ
ḍu gōviṁdayyagārunu pasiṣṭhagōtraṁ Āpastaṁbhasūtra
ṁ yajuśākhādhyāyunu pedda ka(kē)śavayyaṁgāri
komāruṁḍu ka(kē)śavayyaṁnunu vāri dāyādulu vīraṁ
yyānu ceṁnayyagāru modalaina vipravinōdulu
Anaṁtamulaina daṁḍamulu samarpiṁci yiccina dharmmaśā
sanakramameṭlannanu māku Iṁjēṭa sdhaḷamaṁduvunnanānā
gōtra nānāsūtra nānānāmadhēyulaina Asē(śē)ṣa vidva
mahājanālunu māku Ēṁḍōkaṁṭa Iccuka va
ccēṭi ka 0 . 3 Akṣarālanu nu śrīrā
majayaṁti puṇyakālamaṁdu dhanurmāsana bakka
dhāravōsi yistimi . ce(ca)tussa
mudraṁ bhu(bhū)maṁḍalamaṁdunu mā vipravinō
dulakellānu puṇyaṁgānu dhāravōsi yistimi ganaka Āca
ṁdrākasthāyigānu Anubhaviṁcēdi yi dharmmāsuku
tappinānu kāsi(śi)lōnu tamatali taṁḍrani gō
brāṁhalanu vadhiṁcina pāpāna pōvāru tavivritti
pāpāna pōvāru
much damaged
yiccina dharmma śāsanaṁ . dānapālanayōrmadhyē dānāccrē
yōnupālanaṁ dānā rgga tipālanādaccu
taṁ padaṁ . maṁgaḷamahā śrī śrī śrī jēI (yu)nu .
[Anaṁttaya]vrālu vālu vrālu
Digital edition of SII 31.114 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
